title: Peruvian Potato Fritters
description: Crunchy and comforting, these fritters are a twist on traditional Peruvian cuisine. Perfect as a side dish or snack.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
In a bowl, combine grated potatoes, flour, and a pinch of salt. Mix well.
Add beaten egg and mix until combined.
If using bread crumbs, fold them into the potato mixture.
Using a spoon, drop small portions of the mixture into the hot oil.
Fry fritters until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes on each side.
Serve hot with Peruvian aji amarillo pepper sauce or hot sauce.
